welcome_title: Welcome to La Piccola Italia DAO
welcome_subtitle: This is the analytics & meritocracy hub for our group. Track your performance, earn on-chain merits, and build your professional reputation.
connect_desc: Connect your wallet to access dashboards, rankings, payroll, attendance, and your merit profile.

feature_list.merits: Measure and certify your merits on the blockchain.
feature_list.rankings: Company & store rankings, KPIs and comparisons.
feature_list.payroll: Secure access to payroll and attendance.
feature_list.privacy: Your keys, your identity. You’re in control.

disclaimer: By connecting a wallet you agree to internal policies and terms.
